dr10_v2_reachability_logic.cash_equity_cost_drag: per-share commission (~$0.005) + half-bid-ask slippage (~1bp) is a tiny fraction of notional; even a medium/faster breakout at higher turnover keeps S2 cost_drag well under 5% (s14/s15 observed ~0.3-0.9%).
dr10_v2_reachability_logic.expected_status: CLEARS WITH STRONG MARGIN for any reasonable trend/breakout/momentum mechanic on liquid large-caps (cost_drag branch does not fire; AND-conjunction not triggered regardless of turnover).
dr10_v2_reachability_logic.rule: DR10 v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e): REJECT_FAST only if (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05).
dr10_v2_reachability_logic.twelve_name_sizing_note: At $100k start cash across up to N concurrent positions, per-name allocation is smaller -> integer-share rounding slightly coarser for high-priced names (UNH ~$500), but does not threaten DR10 v2; the Tier-N PLAN will lock sizing.

non_split_corporate_action_notes_informa.JNJ_Kenvue_spinoff_2023_08: Under split_only, the Kenvue distribution is NOT adjusted and appears as a one-day price drop (~8-10%). This is a PRICE event flagged INFORMATIONAL (analogous to a large dividend); it is NOT a split-event-consistency fail and NOT a calendar gap. Document explicitly in the DR9 result so the downstream PLAN/BUILD can account for it.
non_split_corporate_action_notes_informa.META_2022_drawdown: large price decline is a PRICE event, not a data gap/split -> not a DR9 condition.
non_split_corporate_action_notes_informa.dividend_ex_dates: JPM/XOM/KO/CVX/JNJ have higher dividend yields; under split_only ex-div dates show small downward jumps (<1% of price) -> informational, NOT a DR9 fail condition.

dr9_audit_framework.per_symbol_check_procedure: Per symbol: (1) verify CSV exists + sha vs manifest; (2) parse schema date,open,high,low,close,volume; (3) compute gap_continuity vs NYSE trading calendar >= 0.95; (4) max_gap_ratio <= 0.30 (largest inter-bar CALENDAR gap; price jumps are NOT gaps); (5) quality_violation_count <= 5 (non-positive prices, high<low, NaN, etc.); (6) documented_split_event_consistency (verify each known split's pre/post ratio ~1.0 under split_only); (7) roll_event_count NOT_APPLICABLE_CASH_EQUITY; (8) aggregate PASS / FAIL / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD.

split_event_consistency_requirements.AAPL_2020_08_31_4to1: already verified PASS (ratio ~1.034 under split_only) in cross-sector + all-tech DR9; re-verify if re-fetched
split_event_consistency_requirements.AMZN_2022_06_06_20to1: FRESH — MUST verify ratio ~1.0 under split_only across 2022-06-06 (20x factor; the most consequential split-consistency check in the basket)
split_event_consistency_requirements.NVDA_2021_07_20_4to1_and_2024_06_10_10to: both already verified PASS in all-tech DR9; re-verify if re-fetched
split_event_consistency_requirements.WMT_2024_02_26_3to1: FRESH — MUST verify ratio ~1.0 under split_only across 2024-02-26 (split is in the OOS window; verification is data-integrity only and does NOT constitute OOS signal inspection)
split_event_consistency_requirements.no_split_names: MSFT/JPM/XOM/UNH/KO/META/CVX have no splits in window -> documented_split_event_consistency trivially PASS

framework_dr10_binding: v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e); binds s14+ candidates incl. s16

k9_reachability_logic_for_non_mean_rever.conclusion_for_plan_time: A 12-name basket makes a MEDIUM-to-FASTER breakout/trend mechanic K9-reachable at OOS (>=50/y), resolving the s15-selection-plan blocker that killed trend on the 3-name basket. The s16 Tier-N PLAN must still include its own K9-reachability table for the chosen mechanic; slow-trend and monthly-rerank momentum remain borderline and would need a frequency-clearing design choice.

expected_per_name_round_trips_per_year_b.faster_channel_breakout_e_g_Donchian_10_: ~12-20/y per name -> 12 names = ~144-240/y -> CLEARS comfortably (watch DR10 turnover, still non-binding under v2 cost_drag branch)
expected_per_name_round_trips_per_year_b.medium_breakout_e_g_Donchian_20_10_or_du: ~8-15/y per name -> 12 names = ~96-180/y basket -> CLEARS BOTH IS and OOS with margin
expected_per_name_round_trips_per_year_b.slow_trend_e_g_200d_MA_or_Donchian_55_20: ~3-6/y per name -> 12 names = ~36-72/y basket -> CLEARS IS; BORDERLINE-CLEARS OOS (>=50/y near the high end)
expected_per_name_round_trips_per_year_b.time_series_or_cross_sectional_momentum_: LOW turnover (~12-24 position-changes/y basket) -> likely K9-LIGHT; flag as borderline-to-fail OOS; weekly re-rank improves it

k9_reachability_logic_for_non_mean_rever.k9_inviolate_carried: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase
k9_reachability_logic_for_non_mean_rever.purpose: The reason to expand to 12 names: make a NON-mean-reversion mechanic K9-reachable (OOS >= 50 trades/y).

low_data_friction_note: 5 of 12 names are ALREADY DR9-PASSED and reusable byte-equivalent (AAPL/JPM/XOM from cross-sector b13af03 result_seal a8ff9126; MSFT/NVDA from all-tech 214bae0 result_seal 1c93d4294e). Only 7 require fresh Tiingo split_only fetch + full DR9.

motivation.forbidden_carried: No mean-reversion on this universe that would merely re-skin s14/s15 (T-FORBID-17/18 carried); the s16 candidate must be a non-mean-reversion family OR an explicitly-justified different design. This RUN_BOOK does not lock the mechanic.
motivation.this_is_a_data_side_step_only: This RUN_BOOK establishes whether a K9-clearing, DR10-v2-compatible, clean-corporate-action 12-name universe is AVAILABLE. Mechanic selection (trend vs momentum vs breakout) is deferred to the s16 Tier-N spec PLAN under a separate authorization.
motivation.why_expand_the_universe: The post-s15 selection plan (343bdac) found the binding tension: on the 3-name AAPL/JPM/XOM daily basket, only mean-reversion clears K9 (frequent signals) and its edge is now exhausted (s14 + s15 both terminal FAIL_SAFETY); non-mean-reversion families (trend/momentum/breakout) are K9-light on 3 names (~6-24/y basket << 50/y OOS floor). Expanding to ~12 names lifts basket trade frequency ~4x, making a NON-mean-reversion candidate K9-reachable WITHOUT reusing the exhausted mean-reversion family.

Status PENDING operator-side fetch of 7 fresh names.

5 names (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/JPM/XOM) ALREADY DR9-PASSED and reusable byte-equivalent

K9-reachability logic showing a 12-name basket makes a NON-mean-reversion (trend/breakout) mechanic K9-OOS-reachable

Contingency tree with an 8-name floor to protect trend K9-OOS reachability
Mechanic selection deferred to the s16 Tier-N spec PLAN
